examples: He inspires affection and respect as a man of unquestionable integrity.
The academic performance of her students has proved that her professional career as a teacher is unquestionable.
Reasons behind this decision are as transparent and 'unquestionable' as ever.
In Denver, neither Billups nor anyone else stole his spotlight as the unquestionable superstar.
For more than five years, Apple (NASDAQ:AAPL) had an unquestionable lead over Microsoft (NASDAQ:MSFT).
